## Anti-slop check

If the bug is "the plugin produced something that looks AI-generated", which specific anti-pattern from `references/foundations/anti-patterns.md` did it violate? Run `/ux-lint` against the output and paste the report.

## Environment

- Plugin version: <!-- e.g. v1.5.3 -->
- Claude Code version: <!-- /version -->
- Stack: <!-- React / Next / Vue / Blade / Astro / vanilla -->
- OS: <!-- macOS / Linux / Windows -->
